fallback_contact.title: EllisDon Winnipeg office — Estimating department
fallback_contact.rationale: EllisDon is a national GC; Winnipeg presence exists (e.g., active Concrete & Formwork PM job posting in Winnipeg) but no specific Winnipeg-based estimator surfaced in public search. Their Winnipeg estimating likely runs through regional structure tied to Calgary/Toronto. RECOMMENDED: Phone EllisDon Winnipeg office; ask for the local estimating lead. Also try direct LinkedIn search for 'EllisDon Winnipeg' employees with estimator title.

needs_review_flags: EllisDon Winnipeg office contact details should be confirmed — office address not surfaced directly
Manual LinkedIn search by location ('Winnipeg' + 'EllisDon') needed to find specific estimator names

EllisDon has lots of named estimators company-wide but none clearly tied to Winnipeg in search results — Doug MacArthur, Nathira Saour, Tanner Fedorchuk are EllisDon estimators but locations not Winnipeg-confirmed
personalization_hooks: EllisDon is one of the biggest GCs in Canada — getting on their bid list opens national opportunities, not just Winnipeg
Lead with the automation pitch (5:30 PM auto-reports, 6-day delay forecast) — large GCs are the ones who care most about subs that integrate cleanly with their PM systems

sources.claim: Richard Whyte — SVP Preconstruction & Estimating, Civil Division (national, not Winnipeg-specific)
